description: A German HGB annual-financial-statement excerpt containing a balance sheet (HGB-Bilanz) and an income statement (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung). Extract only the current reporting period (the 31.12.2022 / year 2022 column); ignore the prior-year (Vorjahr) comparative column entirely.

companyName.description: Name of the company the financial statement belongs to, as printed in the document.

balanceSheetDate.description: The reporting date of the current-period balance sheet in YYYY-MM-DD format (the HGB-Bilanz reporting date, not the prior-year date).

totalAssets.description: The printed Summe der Aktiva total for the current period as a number, without currency symbols or thousands separators.

totalEquityAndLiabilities.description: The printed Summe der Passiva total for the current period as a number, without currency symbols or thousands separators.

netResult.description: The current-period net result (Jahresüberschuss or Jahresfehlbetrag) from the income statement as a number; negative for a loss.

balanceSheet.description: each individual line item (current-period column only) with a printed monetary amount. exclude subtotal rows, total/grand-total rows, and 'of which'/'davon' memo sub-lines. use the printed label exactly, without adding '(Summe)' or '(subtotal)'.

lineItem.description: the line item's printed label exactly as shown, INCLUDING any leading enumerator such as '1.', '2.', 'a)', 'b)', 'I.' as printed; do not add qualifiers like '(Summe)'.

amount.description: The current-period monetary amount printed for this balance-sheet line, as a number in EUR without currency symbols or thousands separators.

incomeStatement.description: each individual line item (current-period column only) with a printed monetary amount. exclude subtotal rows, total/grand-total rows, and 'of which'/'davon' memo sub-lines. use the printed label exactly, without adding '(Summe)' or '(subtotal)'.

lineItem.description: the line item's printed label exactly as shown, INCLUDING any leading enumerator such as '1.', '2.', 'a)', 'b)', 'I.' as printed; do not add qualifiers like '(Summe)'.

amount.description: The current-period monetary amount printed for this income-statement line, as a number without currency symbols or thousands separators (figures may be in EUR or TEUR; extract the printed figure as-is).
